name: Yin He Holdings Limited
summary: Yin He Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides human resources services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through six segments: Human Resources Services, Credit Consultancy Services, Loan Facilitation Services, Asset Management Services, Loan Financing Services, and Insurance Training Services. It offers staff outsourcing services, executive/staff search, and other human resources support services; credit assessment and consultancy services; financial advisory services for corporate, asset management firms, private equity funds, and minority investments in private companies; and loan financing services. The company also operates peer-to-peer financing platform and other loan facilitation business, as well as provision of other relevant consultation services. In addition, it engages in insurance training business. The company was formerly known as Zebra Strategic Holdings Limited and changed its name to Yin He Holdings Limited in January 2016. Yin He Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
